message:
feat(updater): add get_version() for pinned version lookups

Add method to retrieve metadata for a specific release version,
supporting the --target-version flag in ms update.

## New Method: UpdateChecker::get_version(target: &Version)

Fetches all releases and finds the exact version match:
- Ignores channel filtering (allows fetching any version)
- Returns Option<ReleaseInfo> (None if version not found)
- Used by update command for pinned installs/rollbacks

## Use Cases

1. Rollback: ms update --target-version 0.4.8
2. Testing: Install specific release before deployment
3. CI/CD: Pin to exact version for reproducibility

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
